source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The circuit for a non-inverting amplifier incorporating an ideal op-amp is shown in Fig. 7.1. The light-emitting diode (LED) emits light when the potential difference across it is at least 2.0 V. The current in the LED must not be greater than 20 mA. State the maximum value of the output potential $V_{\text{OUT}}$.

image_dependency: 题干显式引用“shown in Fig. 7.1”，核心电路信息在图中而不在文字中完整给出
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明不是纯文本即可解答的问题
问题涉及电路连接关系与元件参数读取，这类信息通常强依赖示意图
multi_step: 需要结合 LED 导通阈值（至少 2.0 V）与最大允许电流（20 mA）两个条件
还需要从电路图读取与输出端相关的元件/连接信息后才能推出最大 V_OUT
答案不是直接读图，属于条件组合后的数值结论
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，标准答案为单一数值“5.0 V”，便于核验
题目目标明确，为“State the maximum value of the output potential V_OUT”
registry_passed=true，题目与答案资产登记完整，可支持后续规则或人工复核
